cursos.name: Hydrogen
cursos.description: Electron configuration: 1s¹. With a standard atomic weight of 1.008, hydrogen is the lightest element on the periodic table.

cursos.name: Helium
cursos.description: Electron configuration: 1s². It is a colorless, odorless, tasteless, non-toxic,inert, monatomic gas, the first in the noble gas group in the   periodic table. Its boiling point is the lowest among all the   elements.

cursos.name: Lithium
cursos.description: Electron configuration: [He] 2s¹. It is a soft, silvery-white alkali metal. Under   standard conditions, it is the lightest metal and the lightest solid element.

cursos.name: Beryllium
cursos.description: Electron configuration: [He] 2s². It is a relatively rare element in the universe,  usually occurring as a product of the spallation of larger atomic  nuclei that have collided with cosmic rays.

cursos.name: Boron
cursos.description: Electron configuration: [He] 2s² 2p¹. Produced entirely by cosmic ray spallation and supernovae and not by stellar nucleosynthesis, it is a low-abundance element in the Solar system and in the Earth's crust.

cursos.name: Carbon
cursos.description: Electron configuration: [He] 2s² 2p². It is nonmetallic and tetravalent—making four electrons available to form covalent chemical bonds. It belongs to group 14 of the periodic table.

cursos.name: Nitrogen
cursos.description: Electron configuration: [He] 2s² 2p³.. It was first discovered and isolated by Scottish  physician Daniel Rutherford in 1772.

cursos.name: Oxygen
cursos.description: Electron configuration: [He] 2s² 2p⁴.. It is a member of the chalcogen group on the periodic table, a highly reactive nonmetal, and an oxidizing agent that readily forms oxides with most elements as well as with other compounds.

cursos.name: Fluorine
cursos.description: Electron configuration: [He] 2s² 2p⁵. It is the lightest halogen and exists as a highly toxic pale yellow diatomic gas at standard conditions.

cursos.name: Neon
cursos.description: Electron configuration: [He] 2s² 2p⁶. It is a noble gas. Neon is a colorless, odorless, inert monatomic gas under standard conditions, with about two-thirds the density of air.

cursos.name: Sodium
cursos.description: From Neo-Latin natrium. Electron configuration: [Ne] 3s¹. It is a soft, silvery-white, highly reactive metal. Sodium is an alkali metal, being in group 1 of the periodic table.

cursos.name: Magnesium
cursos.description: Electron configuration: [Ne] 3s². It is a shiny gray metal having a low density, low melting point, and high chemical reactivity. Like the other alkaline earth metals (group 2 of the periodic table).

cursos.name: Aluminium
cursos.description: Electron configuration: [Ne] 3s² 3p¹.It has a density lower than other common metals, about one-third that of steel.
